steps.t: Ashâmi and Raphûz, unnerved by the words of the cultist, want to collect evidence of a greater threat to present to Numûru. They ask you to search nea…
Near Dûl Zidur and the Bridge of Princes you saw an encampment of Orcs to the north. Among the Orcs, stood one of proportions more fitting of a troll:…
Having heard your report and deciphered the letter they discovered, Ashâmi and Raphûz send you to present the evidence to Numûru at his post in Urmâkh…
Numûru refuses to look to other threats while the Ordâkhai remain. He will not bring the information to Mizâdi. Speak with Ashâmi or Raphûz at their h…
